title: G2PLUS 2m Blue Fringe Garland, 20cm Sparkly Tinsel Fringing, Glitter Tinsel Garland, Shiny Backdrop Party Streamers for Birthday Wedding Prom Decoration
features: 【Holographic Fringe Garland 】Our tinsel garland is made of high quality polyester and PET, durable, sturdy and non-tearable. The foil material have a holographic effect which means they are featuring a glittery, shimmering effect, this fringe garland serves as a perfect decoration. It adds a touch of glamour to any setting, creating a festive and eye - catching atmosphere.

【20cm Wide Tinsel Fringe Bunting】You will get a tassel foil garland with a length of 2m for the whole flag and 20cm long tassels, it can be used to decorate tables, child's rooms, walls, bridal showers, weddings, parties, and all kinds of celebratory events. Its flexibility makes it suitable for various spaces.

【Sparkly and Eye - Catching Design】It belongs to the popular styles of tinsel fringing, tinsel curtain banner, fringe bunting, and more. Meeting the aesthetic needs of modern decoration, Especially suitable for table tinsel fringe decoration and wall adornment, it can transform a plain surface into a decorative wonderland, enhancing the overall look of your space. it is a trendy choice for your events.

【Hanging Sparkly Tassel Garland】This sparkly fringe garland is easy to install and remove, saving you time and effort. It's highly appealing to kids, teenagers, youth, children, and girls. Ideal for fun - filled hen parties or young - crowd celebrations, it makes any event more

【Tinsel Fringing for Decoration】The glitter foil garland, featuring versatile tinsel fringing, is a decoration gem for any event. Be it a wedding's elegance, a hen party's merriment, a birthday's joy, a prom's glamour, or a graduation's significance, it fits perfectly.

Tinsel Fringe Garland Merchant video Fringe garland with a 20 cm drop; the tassel section is 1.5 m long, and the full length including the hanging rope is 2 m. Flowing strands sway with movement, the neat header keeps lines tidy, and a slight reflective sheen adds a soft, festive twinkle. Tinsel Garland for Christmas, New Year, Birthdays Use as a backdrop, doorway trim, or table skirt; frame photo booths, windows, and dessert bars; dress stages and shop displays. Perfect for Christmas and New Year, birthdays, weddings, showers, hen nights, graduations, proms, office parties, and school events.
